fbe.summary: Still cited as the most polished browser-based blueprint editor, but community consistently flags that it has not been updated for the Space Age DLC. Pre-2.0 entities render correctly; new 2.0/Space Age prototypes do not.
criticisms: Not updated for Space Age DLC (as of 2025)
Domain migrated; some bookmarks point to dead teoxoy.github.io URL
praise: Imports from blueprint strings, pastebin, factorioprints, factorio.school, gist, gitlab, google docs
In-browser editing with the same controls as in-game

factoriolab.summary: Treated as the modern successor to KirkMcDonald's calculator. Multi-game (Factorio, Dyson Sphere Program, Satisfactory). Active development, quoted as giving 'same results' as KirkMcDonald within rounding.
criticisms: Some users still find KirkMcDonald's UI faster for quick lookups
praise: Replaces KirkMcDonald with broader game coverage
Same numeric output as KirkMcDonald given same settings

kirkmcdonald.summary: Long-standing reference calculator. Community trusts the math ('never had a problem with it being wrong') but increasingly redirects newcomers to FactorioLab for active 2.0/Space Age coverage.

threads.title: Anyone knows a calculation tool that is actually correct and working?

criticisms: Coverage of Space Age content lags behind FactorioLab
praise: Minimal UI; fast for vanilla calculations

factorio-draftsman.summary: No high-volume r/factorio discussion surfaced; the audience is developers building external tools, not end-user players. Mentioned in adjacent contexts (FBSR ecosystem, blueprint generation scripts).
criticisms: Targets programmers, not in-game players, so largely absent from r/factorio recommendation threads
praise: Used by other community projects to programmatically build/validate blueprint strings
factorio-draftsman.annotation: no community discussion found in r/factorio search results; sentiment inferred from adjacent tooling references
